content:
# Rheology

**Summary**: The study of the flow of matter primarily as a function of the forces acting upon it.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2021-alkhowaildi|Alkhowaildi, 2021]] analyzed the rheology of stimulation fluids to ensure they met industry requirements for viscosity and stability.

- [[2021-al-malki|Al-Malki, 2021]] evaluated the impact of mud rheology on hole cleaning in deviated wells.

## Scientific Context

- [[2021-alkhowaildi|Alkhowaildi, 2021]] Rheology is critical for ensuring that stimulation fluids can transport proppants and maintain wellbore stability.

- [[2021-al-malki|Al-Malki, 2021]] evaluated the impact of mud rheology on hole cleaning in deviated wells.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2021-alkhowaildi|Alkhowaildi, 2021]] Measured using Fann Model 35 and Chandler Model 5550 viscometers.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The addition of GLDA was shown to control the thickening profile and stability of the fluid in high-salinity water. ([[2021-alkhowaildi|Alkhowaildi, 2021, p. 11]])

- Mud rheology is a primary factor influencing the transport of cuttings in high-angle wellbores. ([[2021-al-malki|Al-Malki, 2021, p. 99]])
